jcr:content.jcr:title: AbbVie Ventures Portfolio
jcr:content.cardDescription: AbbVie Ventures is focused on early-stage opportunities in oncology, immunology, neuroscience, eye care, and aesthetics.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: AbbVie Ventures is focused on early-stage opportunities in oncology, immunology, neuroscience, eye care, and aesthetics.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Accent Therapeutics is leading the translation of RNA-modifying protein(RMP)biology into promising new precision therapies for cancer.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Aquinnah Pharmaceuticals is developing small molecule therapeutics targeting pathologic proteins associated with persistent stress granules for the treatment of neurodegenerative disease.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Artios Pharma is developing cancer treatments that target DNA Damage Response pathways to selectively kill cancer cells.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Capsida Therapeutics is creating a new class of targeted gene therapies for both CNS and non-CNS disorders.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Cephagenix is exploring a novel MoA for the treatment of migraines.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: DaCapo Brainscience leverages insights from longitudinal patient datasets to develop drugs against targets implicated in faster progression of neurodegenerative diseases.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Dimericon Therapeutics is exploring cross-linked helix dimers as therapeutics for small molecule development.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: DISCO Pharmaceuticals is developing novel mass spectrometry methods to decode the cancer cell surface.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: EndLyz Therapeutics is developing disease-modifying therapeutics which restore endo-lysosomal function and abrogate neurodegeneration in Parkinson’s disease (PD) and other dementias.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Enthera is developing first-in-class therapeutics for severe autoimmune disorders.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: EvolveImmune Therapeutics is developing a proprietary multi-specific T-cell engager platform with costimulation.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: FireCyte is an emerging biotechnology company developing novel treatment strategies focused on the role of microglia and neuroinflammation in progressive neurodegenerative diseases of the eye.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Light Horse Therapeutics is developing novel CRISPR-based functional site-dependency maps with advanced drug discovery capabilities as a platform technology with broad therapeutic relevance.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Mozart Therapeutics is orchestrating a novel regulatory CD8 T cell network to discover and develop disease modifying therapies that restore immune balance in autoimmune and inflammatory diseases.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Nitrase Therapeutics is developing drugs against a newly identified class of enzymes which play a harmful role in a variety of age and inflammation dependent diseases.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Oisin Biotechnologies is advancing a pipeline of therapies for age-related diseases: eliminating unwanted fat cells and building muscle mass.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Oisin Biotechnologies is advancing a pipeline of therapies for age-related diseases: eliminating unwanted fat cells and building muscle mass.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Parvus Therapeutics is developing Navacim platform: presentation of peptide-MHCs to T cells to induce Treg differentiation.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Portera Therapeutics is developing small molecule enhancers of the proteasome.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Quanta Therapeutics is pioneering allosteric modulation to control RAS signaling for inhibition of the full scope of RAS-driven cancer types.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: ReAx Biotechnologies is developing activity-dependent protein ligation technology for quantitative in-cell profiling.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Ribometrix is a platform therapeutics company discovering small molecule drugs that target functional 3D RNA structures to treat human disease.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Sionna Therapeutics (NASDAQ: SION) is advancing a cystic fibrosis-focused pipeline featuring novel mechanisms of action with the potential to redefine standard of care.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: SNC Therapeutics is developing a synthetic drug carrier platform for subcutaneous nanotherapy.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Souffle Therapeutics mission is to develop medicines enabled by extrahepatic cell-specific delivery of RNAs.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Syndeio Biosciences is using precision medicine to pioneer a new class of rapid-acting therapies targeting synaptic health.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Third Arc Bio is developing multifunctional antibodies optimized for T cell engagement across solid tumors and immunology.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: ThirtyFiveBio is developing small molecule antagonists of a potential first-in-class GPCR target for gastrointestinal indications.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Trishula Therapeutics is dedicated to improving outcomes for people with cancer by developing TTX-030, a first-in-class, anti-CD39 antibody.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Umoja Biopharma is pioneering the future of immunotherapy by reprogramming T cells in vivo.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: XenImmune Therapeutics is applying the biology of organ transplant hyperacute rejection to fight cancer.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Xilio Therapeutics (NASDAQ: XLO) is developing a clinically-validated platform technology for tumor-activated masked biologics, including T cell engagers.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Zag Bio is harnessing natural mechanisms for tolerance induction to transform outcomes in autoimmunity.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Immunology Stealth NewCo is developing a novel antigen-agnostic approach for rheumatoid arthritis and other inflammatory diseases.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Immunology Stealth NewCo identifying dysfunctional signaling axes in gastrointestinal disease based on human biology drugged via an engineered-bug-as-drug approach.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: IPO, NASDAQ: ALEC

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Acquired by Gilead

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Acquired by CSL Behring

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Acquired by Merck

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: IPO, NASDAQ: CRBU

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: NASDAQ: CARM

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Acquired by Novartis after Merger with Aduro Biotech, NASDAQ: KDNY

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Acquired by Lilly

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: NASDAQ: IRON

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Acquired by Locust Walk Acquisition Corp (SPAC merger), NASDAQ: EFTR

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: IPO, NASDAQ: XCUR

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Acquired by Otsuka Pharmaceuticals

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: IPO, NASDAQ: KALA

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Acquired by Zymergen

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Acquired by Lilly, IPO, NASDAQ: MORF

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Acquired by Lilly

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Acquired by Amgen

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Acquired by Sanofi

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Acquired by Gilead
